Pivot-RP Funding Alert

Search: wetland restoration OR conservation planning
Urban Wetlands Adaptation Catalyst Grant
Sponsor: Natural Sciences and Engineering Research Council of Canada
Deadline: Apr 30, 2026
Supports collaborative restoration pilots, urban wetland resilience planning, and decision-support tools.
Community Biodiversity Monitoring Partnership Fund
Funder: Gordon and Betty Moore Foundation
Due Date: May 15, 2026
Funds biodiversity monitoring networks, Indigenous partnerships, and applied conservation analytics.
